hero-subtitle: Crafting scalable web applications, robust APIs, and intelligent solutions — from concept to production.
about-p1: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications, robust APIs, and AI-powered solutions. I work across the entire stack — from React and Next.js frontends to Node.js, NestJS, and Python backends, with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis on the data layer.
about-p2: I've architected multi-tenant SaaS platforms, real-time WebSocket applications, and cloud-native infrastructure on AWS with Docker and Kubernetes. Recently, I've been integrating AI capabilities using OpenAI, LangChain, and vector databases into production systems.
about-p3: Graduated in Computer Science from UniFavip Wyden. Passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and turning complex requirements into elegant, maintainable solutions.
exp1-description: Building and maintaining multi-tenant SaaS platforms with AI integration, real-time features, and cloud-native infrastructure.
exp1-highlights: Multi-tenant architecture, AI-powered features, AWS infrastructure, WebSocket real-time apps, monorepo management
exp2-description: Developed responsive web applications with React and Next.js, implementing design systems and complex state management.
exp2-highlights: React/Next.js applications, design system implementation, state management, REST API integration
skills-subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with daily
contacts-cta: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
